hooks.prompt: Run the code-reviewer agent defined in .claude/agents/code-reviewer.md. Review all staged changes (git diff --cached) before this commit proceeds. If you find any critical issues, output JSON with {"decision": "block", "reason": "<summary of critical issues>"}. If warnings or suggestions only, output {"decision": "allow"} and summarise findings as a systemMessage. If everything looks good, output {"decision": "allow"}.
